case_title: CASTILLO, MIRIAM D. et al VS GRIFFIN, SHIELA BISHOP

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF RODAS, GERARDO A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MIRIAM D. RODAS, GERARDO A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SHIELA BISHOP PLFT'S ARE IN BREACH OF CONTRACT. LIQUIDATED DAMAGES PROVISION APPLIES. DEFT IS ENTITLED TO OLD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
